Name: Mrs. Page
FirstComicDescription: Daredevil goes looking for Karen Page with the intention of proposing. When he finds her, DD comes across an evil ploy! A skeletal creature calling itself Death’s Head has kidnapped Karen’s father. Daredevil makes a promise to eliminate this threat, but after doing battle with 'Death', his promise seems impossible to keep!
